title.rendered: Airble announces partnership with Helijet International to offer online charter flight deals.

content.rendered:
Online charter flight booking service Airble is excited to announce its new partnership with Helijet International Inc. to offer even more non-stop travel choices for private charter passengers seeking to fly in comfort and convenience.

Helijet’s Cessna Citation X charter flights booked through the Airble website or mobile app offer non-stop access to numerous North American destinations, including Cabo San Lucas, Toronto, New York, Miami, Hawaii, plus the Caribbean. Flights to European destinations can also be arranged through Airble.

With decades of experience safely flying more than 2.5 million passengers since it began in 1986, Helijet is a trusted name in aviation offering North America’s largest scheduled passenger helicopter airline, plus fixed-wing charter services.

Now, through its new flight scheduling partnership, Airble takes a major leap forward by adding Helijet private charter deals across British Columbia, North America, and beyond. Empty leg flight offers are also available.

“We are thrilled to welcome Helijet aboard and are confident you will love their exceptional service,” said Airble CEO Saeed Golzar. “At Airble, innovation and sustainability are at the heart of our mission. Airble’s automated platform streamlines the entire air charter process, making it simple for you to browse, book, and instantly pay for your desired travel experience. We are committed to reducing unnecessary emissions by filling seats on aircraft in service, including numerous private empty leg deals. There may be up to 50 deals available on airble.com at any given time.”

Expanded International Reach via Helijet’s Cessna Citation X

Based at its own independent base at Vancouver International Airport (YVR,) Helijet added the Cessna Citation X turbojet aircraft to its fleet earlier this year. One of the fastest luxury commercial jets available, the Citation X has a travel range double that of smaller corporate jets, with cruising speeds exceeding 700mph (Mach .92) and capable of flying at altitudes of 50,000 ft.

The aircraft features:

  • Club-style cabin passenger seating for eight, with a spacious stand-up cabin configuration
  • Ample temperature-controlled independent luggage and cargo compartments
  • Full connectivity with phone, Wi-Fi, internet and streaming services at each seat

Helijet’s Citation X service is also complemented by a six-passenger Learjet aircraft available for charter, as well as connecting passenger helicopter services from downtown Vancouver to downtown Victoria and Nanaimo.

“We’re happy to have Airble join us in offering our clients the ability to streamline the booking process for our charter aircraft,” Helijet President and CEO Danny Sitnam stated. “Together we can offer our customers an incomparable business class booking and travel experience to meet their long-distance travel requirements.”

Press Release: Click for PDF release

About Airble

Since 2019, Richmond B.C. based Airble has led the revolution in private aviation by operating as an air charter platform through digital booking. Our core ethos is founded on displaying accurate aircraft availability, transparent prices, and instant booking. Our vision is to build the ultimate platform for passengers and air operators to connect, directly and forge ourselves as the trusted marketplace for on-demand air travel and change the global perception of private aviation. https://airble.com/

About Helijet:

Helijet International is a privately held Canadian-owned company based at the Vancouver International Airport, British Columbia, Canada, and is recognized as North America’s largest helicopter airline, carrying more than 2.5 million guests since 1986. In addition to its scheduled helicopter services, Helijet is the Province of British Columbia’s longest standing and largest air service provider of dedicated medically equipped helicopters.

Helijet provides exclusive-use helicopter and fixed-wing services to world-renowned sport fishing resorts, public service and energy companies throughout the west coast of British Columbia and North America. Helijet’s wholly owned subsidiary, Pacific Heliport Services, Ltd., is Canada’s largest privately managed Heliport operator, overseeing Transport Canada-certified heliports in downtown Vancouver, Victoria and Nanaimo. Helijet has been recognized by communities and aviation associations alike as a socially responsible and forward-thinking air operator that deeply engages with the communities it serves. For more information, visit https://helijet.to.com/charter-flights/citation-x/
